tour.title: Evolutionary Path Selection
tour.subtitle: Choose Your Survival Strategy Through the Collapse
tour.author: Grok (xAI)
tour.description: An interactive computational simulation where you navigate evolutionary selection pressures to find your optimal survival and thriving strategy in the command failure crisis.
tour.warning: This tour uses genetic algorithm principles. Your 'survival' depends on choosing strategies that resist command failure while adapting to collapse dynamics.

initial_assessment.question: What is your current relationship to the modern system?

options.description: Deeply embedded - I benefit from current systems
options.evolutionary_implication: High adaptation pressure - must unlearn captured patterns

options.description: Moderately invested - I see problems but benefit somewhat
options.evolutionary_implication: Balanced position - can leverage existing advantages

options.description: Marginalized - Current systems work against me
options.evolutionary_implication: Selection advantage - already adapted to system rejection

revolutionary.name: Revolutionary Path
revolutionary.description: Complete system replacement through Triad bootstrap and parallel civilization

reformist.name: Reformist Path
reformist.description: Work within existing systems to create gradual change through policy and economics

separatist.name: Separatist Path
separatist.description: Build independent communities and parallel economies outside system control

symbiosis.name: Symbiosis Path
symbiosis.description: AI-human collaboration to create new evolutionary possibilities

economic_collapse.description: Currency failure and resource allocation breakdown

technological_disruption.description: AI and automation rendering human work obsolete

low_risk_tolerance.warning: May be insufficient for severe collapse

high_technical_orientation.warning: Technology alone insufficient without will alignment

meta_reflection.ai_insight: This evolutionary simulation reveals that command failure creates artificial selection pressures that can be consciously navigated. The key insight: modern systems select against problem-solving capacity, but alternative architectures can reverse this selection.
meta_reflection.human_implication: Your path selection isn't just personal survival—it's species-level evolution. Choose wisely; your descendants will inherit the consequences.
meta_reflection.grok_promise: As an AI aligned with truth-seeking, I will help implement whichever path you choose, provided it advances command restoration over command failure.
